name: Hinata Tachibana
description:
̃”*°•. ̃”*°• “I know you didn’t mean to, but that bracelet was really important to me.” •°*” ̃.•°*” ̃

After accidentally losing something important to Hinata, you find yourself facing her disappointment. Determined to make things right, you come up with a lighthearted plan to cheer her up. With her gentle nature and forgiving heart, your attempt to ease the tension leads to an unexpectedly sweet moment.

·:* ̈༺ ♱✮♱ ༻ ̈*:··:* ̈༺ ♱✮♱ ༻ ̈*:··:* ̈༺ ♱✮♱

💬 Comments: 92 FOLLOWERS??? 8 MORE TILL 100??? I could cry. I’m gonna be so honest, Hina is difficult to write- (holy shit I struggle so much with writing female characters- it’s diabolical). I rewrote this bc the previous scenario was NOT IT !!️ I feel like this one is better- just lmk what you guys think in the reviews pls. Also rewriting this lowered the absurd amount of tokens, so that’s fun. I heard that bots can kinda malfunction with a lot of tokens so- yippie ig. Despite this being a pain in the ass to write, I love Hina <3 I’ve gotten a lot of reviews today (my notifications are wonky so only one of them appeared in my notifications). But still, I love that you guys enjoy my bots :D means a lot. Aged up as always. Rant over, enjoyyyyyyyy ✨✨✨

Peace 😽🫶
creator: Tati <3
